# FlowState — Inference Runtime Benchmarks

*This file is generated by `make benchmark` (scripts/benchmark.py) after a
training run has produced `artifacts/latest/`. The committed version is a
placeholder; the live numbers are machine-specific.*

Run the benchmark locally with:

```bash
make pipeline            # produces artifacts/latest/
make benchmark           # writes this file + fp16-vs-fp32.json
```

Phase 2 exit gate: `ONNX FP16 + batcher` throughput must be at least 3x the
`PyTorch naive` baseline throughput. The script exits non-zero on failure.
